ddt:Target.Name: FK25_C1A_UDS_v1.0
ddt:Target.Description:
Control for FK25 CAN C1A Vehicle : LFD ph2 Software version : 8A-0x
2018-05-24
BOBAE KIM (bobae.kim@renaultsamsungm.com)
2019-01-18
VELPULA SIDHARTHA <Updated DIDs, DTCs, SCREENS>

Data.Name: BrakeInfoStatus (CAN)
Data.Comment: Brake information status received from ABS

Data.Name: AT_TorqueControlType (CAN)
Data.Comment: Type of torque control performed to the engine

Data.Name: CrankingAuthorization_AT (CAN)
Data.Comment: Autorization by the gearbox for engine to crank

Data.Name: CruiseControlStatus_forTM (CAN)
Data.Comment: Type of cruise control running (speed limiter or cruise control)

Data.Name: ECM_TorqueRequestStatus (CAN)
Data.Comment: Type of torque request sent by gearbox to the engine

Item.Text: Exact torque request cannot be achieved (mesure imprecision)
Transient state preventing torque request realization
Torque request can not be achieved

Data.Name: Line pressure solenoid current
Data.Comment: Current detected value of line pressure solenoid

Data.Name: Secondary pressure solenoid current
Data.Comment: Current detected value of secondary pressure solenoid

Data.Name: Self-learning flag
Data.Comment: Flag that indicates the writing in EEprom is well done

Data.Name: Engine torque
Data.Comment: Actual torque delivered by the engine

Data.Name: Current Failure
Data.Comment: Indicating if the failure is always present or not

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or short circuit to ground
Open circuit or short circuit to power supply

Data.Name: Target step motor displacement
Data.Comment: Desired step motor displacement regarding initial position

Data.Name: AT_MinimumIdleSpeedRequest (CAN)
Data.Comment: Minimum requested value of engine idle speed

Data.Name: Command status of select on/off solenoid
Command status of shift lock solenoid
Lock-up solenoid current
Data.Comment: Current detected value of lock-up solenoid

Data.Name: High clutch & reverse brake solenoid current
Command Current of Line Pressure (PL) Solenoid
Command Current of High/Reverse Clutch (H/R) Solenoid
Command Current of Primary Pressure (PRI) Solenoid
Definition of the supplier production line
Saturated Engine Torque Down Request Value
Normal Engine Torque Down Request Value
Gear engaged in manual mode
Data.Comment: Gear engaged (from 1 to 8) when gearbox running in manual mode

Data.Name: Gear Ratio
Data.Comment: Current gear ratio (primary pulley speed/secondary pulley speed)

Item.Text: Oil temperature sensor failure - Shorted to ground
Oil temperature sensor failure - Opened or shorted to power supply
Turbine revolution speed sensor failure - Rationarity Other 2
Lock-up solenoid failure - Opened or shorted to power supply
Lock-up solenoid failure - Shorted to ground
Secondary Pressure Solenoid Failure - Short to GND (LOW)
Secondary Pressure Solenoid Failure - Open circuit/Short to battery (HIGH)
Primary revolution speed sensor failure - Rationality Other 1
Primary revolution speed sensor failure - Rationality Other 2
Primary revolution speed sensor failure - Open circuit with no pulse
Primary or Secondary pressure sensor failure - Function
Secondary pressure sensor failure - Open circuit (LOW)
Secondary pressure sensor failure - Short to battery(High)
Primary pressure sensor failure - Open circuit (LOW)
Primary pressure sensor failure - Short to battery(High)
Electric Oil Pump - Power supply voltage open
Line Pressure solenoid failure - Shorted to ground
Line Pressure solenoid failure- Opened or shorted to power supply
Primary Pressure Solenoid Failure - Short to GND (LOW)
Primary Pressure Solenoid Failure - Open circuit/Short to battery (HIGH)
Electric Oil Pump - Relay Stuck On
Secondary revolution speed sensor failure - Rationarity Other 2
Secondary revolution speed sensor failure - Open circuit with no pulse
Select pressure solenoid Failure - Short to GND (LOW)
Select pressure solenoid failure - Open circuit/Short to battery (HIGH)
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: G sensor zero point calibration status
DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DM$FD01_Digest of LogicalBlock-FD01 (Program area)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber_R
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumberDataIdentifier
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: VDIAG
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Item.Text: Noch 1 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 2 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 3 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers

Noch 19 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers

Noch 22 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 23 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 24 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 25 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 26 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 27 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 28 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 29 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 30 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 31 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 32 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 33 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers

Noch 36 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 37 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 38 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 39 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers
Noch 40 Warm-Up-Zyklen bis zur Heilung des Fehlers

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber (Nissan)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumberDataIdentifier
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: CVT calibration status_Reading data from ROM ASSY
systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Item.Text: OccurrenceCounter (Counts the number of times the DTC have been set.)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot.Mileage
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.Paddle down switch Paddle up switch
ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000 nor for Clip import

Device.Name: Electric Oil Pump - Power supply voltage open
Electric Oil Pump - Relay Stuck On
Line Pressure solenoid failure - Shorted to ground
Line Pressure solenoid failure- Opened or shorted to power supply
Lock-up solenoid failure - Opened or shorted to power supply
Lock-up solenoid failure - Shorted to ground
Oil temperature sensor failure - Opened or shorted to power supply
Oil temperature sensor failure - Shorted to ground
Primary pressure sensor failure - Open circuit (LOW)
Primary pressure sensor failure - Short to battery(High)
Secondary pressure sensor failure - Open circuit (LOW)
Secondary pressure sensor failure - Short to battery(High)
Primary or Secondary pressure sensor failure - Function
Primary Pressure Solenoid Failure - Open circuit/Short to battery (HIGH)
Primary Pressure Solenoid Failure - Short to GND (LOW)
Secondary Pressure Solenoid Failure - Open circuit/Short to battery (HIGH)
Secondary Pressure Solenoid Failure - Short to GND (LOW)
Turbine revolution speed sensor failure - Rationarity Other 2
Primary revolution speed sensor failure - Rationality Other 1
Primary revolution speed sensor failure - Rationality Other 2
Primary revolution speed sensor failure - Open circuit with no pulse
Secondary revolution speed sensor failure - Rationarity Other 2
Secondary revolution speed sensor failure - Open circuit with no pulse
Select pressure solenoid Failure - Short to GND (LOW)
Select pressure solenoid failure - Open circuit/Short to battery (HIGH)

Label.Text: Vehicle Identification Number

Screen.Name: Clear QR code and learning data

Label.Text: Clear QR code and Learning data
ATCU is replaced by new one >> Please use manual request function
1. Extract QR code from old ATCU using Service $221600
2. Replace New one, write QR code using service $2E1600+QR code from old ATCU
3. Ignition OFF and wait about 3 seconds
CVT is replaced by new one
1. Prepare QR code(The package of CVT includes CD-ROM)
2. Erase QR code ($31011802) in below condition
R range, Vehicle stopped, Engine stopped, Ignition ON, Accelerator pedal ON
3. Write QR code from CD-ROM using $2E1600+QR code (use manual request)
4. Ignition OFF and wait 3 seconds
5. Replace the CVT, and make ignition ON
If QR code is not in EEPRON, self learning flag is displayed as "self learning NOK"
All calibration data delete status
Self learning data delete status
C/V calibration data delete status
Torque management
Gear shifts management

Display.RequestName: DataRead.Paddle down switch Paddle up switch
DataRead.Paddle down switch Paddle up switch

Label.Text: ATCU inputs/outputs management
This screen allow to ignore ABS malfunction due to run on dynamo bench with rear wheels fixed
If the screen isn't displayed in real time, you can use manual reporting request
Don't forget to initialize screen with green button then start reading

Button.Text: To ignore ABS malfunction, to get normal lock-up behavior
To come back to complete diagnostic (normal status)

Label.Text: After G-Sensor replacement, you need to initialize it to "zero" value
Turn ignition switch ON, engine OFF, vehicle at standstill, shift lever in P, brake pedal pressed
CAUTION : Never engine start
CALIBRATE G SENSOR
If G sensor zero calibration status is still "Routine under execution", click until it is changed "Routine completed" or "Routine failed"
EOP Air Bleeding
You need to bleed air for generating proper oil pressure from EOP
it is recommended to execute this routine when vehicle assembly or the replacement of CVT unit so that EOP is good status initially.
CAUTION : Never engine start
Turn ignition switch ON, engine OFF, shift lever in P
